title: Eclipse PvP
body: Eclipse PvP is a 1.8.9 PvP texturepack that brings a dark and moody tone to the game, retexturing tools, armor and all kinds of pvp related items such as tnt, fishing rod, shears, fireballs and much more! The texturepack gives diamonds a great looking gray theme and recolors all wool types into a smoother and better looking version. Also the GUI, HUD and particles follow this theme and explosion particles are retextured into a more vibrant version. Enjoy!! :D
